title: Calycothrix flavescens
taxonomy: Calycothrix flavescens is a species of flowering plant in the family Achariaceae. The classification of this plant is within the genus Calycothrix. Calycothrix flavescens is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It belongs to the class Magnoliopsida, an order Malpighiales, and has a family classification of Achariaceae. This plant is further categorized under the subfamily Acharioideae.
